channel.title: Giscus on user859
channel.description: Recent content in Giscus on user859

item.title: Using Giscus for comments
item.description:
It took a while, but i finally figure out how to add comments into this particular website, using Giscus as the comment provider (?), instead of using Disqus.

Before i resorted on using this provider, i went to look for another comment provider, because using this means you need a GitHub account just to comment, which would probably limit the audience for solely just to make a comment in this website.

But since that other providers need you to self-host the aformentioned provider, and this provider either, which this one need you to pay for a subscri‌ption to use it cloud service, which for obvious reasons make sense for the subscription model (server funding).
